metadata.description: Comprehensive diagram generation skills including charts, architecture diagrams, Mermaid diagrams, and logic diagrams

plugins.name: diagram-skills
plugins.description: Generate charts (bar, line, pie, scatter, radar, gauge), architecture diagrams, Mermaid diagrams (flowchart, sequence, class), and text-to-logic-diagram converters. Supports SVG/HTML output with dark/light themes.
